---
description: Brainstorm ideas and explore the solution space before committing to specs
mode: agent
---

Help me **brainstorm** the given topic or problem.

Invoke `@brainstorming` to run a structured ideation session.

The brainstorming agent will guide you through 12 progressive phases:
1. Requirements Discovery
2. Architecture Planning
3. Domain Model Design
4. Data Flow & Persistence
5. API Design
6. Messaging & Events
7. State Machines & Workflows
8. Design Patterns
9. Security & Multi-Tenancy
10. Cross-Cutting Concerns
11. Documentation Needs
12. Alternatives & Trade-offs

Provide alternative ideas, approaches, or solutions — highlighting pros and cons of each.
Challenge assumptions and encourage creative thinking.
